# datahub_tags (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub tags visible to the authenticated principal.

Backed by `searchAcrossEntities` (OpenSearch). Tags created within the last few seconds may not yet appear. Use the returned `urns` list as the `for_each` value in `import {}` blocks to bulk-import existing tags into Terraform state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of DataHub URNs for all tags (e.g. `["urn:li:tag:pii"]`).
